commit.message:
fix(model-3d): fix face splitting — snap line to plane + use triangle lookup

Three fixes for face splitting:
1. Snap line endpoints onto face plane before 2D projection (fixes
   floating-point errors from matrixWorld.invert() causing missed
   intersections)
2. Use triangleToHEFace for O(1) face lookup instead of findFaceAtPoint
   (avoids point-in-polygon edge cases at vertices/edges)
3. Include updatedAt in edge geometry key so edges re-render after splits

commit.message:
feat(model-3d): HEMesh as single source of truth — edge rendering + kernel extrude

Replace EdgesGeometry (which shows triangulation diagonals) with topology-aware
edge rendering from HEMesh. Add kernel extrudeFace operation for SketchUp-style
push-pull directly on the half-edge mesh, bypassing the Manifold backend.

- Add buildHEEdgeGeometry() to render only real topology edges
- Add extrudeFace() with 3 cases: face-on-solid, standalone, split face
- Wire push-pull to use kernel extrude when HEMesh is available
- Add heFaceId to FaceData for O(1) face lookup
- Update snap candidate generator to use HEMesh edges
- 62 kernel tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Stream Claude API response for faster TTS start

Switch main gamemaster handler from messages.create() to messages.stream().
Parse the "speech" field incrementally from streaming text deltas and send
it to the client via NDJSON as soon as it's available — before Claude
finishes generating actions/tool calls. This lets TTS start while the
response is still being generated, reducing perceived latency on every
interaction.

Retry path (rare fallback) stays non-streaming.

commit.message:
Add Class 6 Maths Chapters 7–10 (Batch 3)

- Chapter 7: Fractions — types, equivalent fractions, comparing, addition/subtraction, multiplication; Indian history of fractions (Brahmagupta, Sulba Sutras)
- Chapter 8: Playing with Constructions — compass/ruler constructions, perpendicular bisector, angle bisector, standard angles (60°/90°/30°/45°), SSS triangle construction, Triangle Inequality
- Chapter 9: Symmetry — line symmetry, rotational symmetry (order/angle), tessellations; Indian art (Rangoli, Ashoka Chakra, Kolam, Taj Mahal)
- Chapter 10: The Other Side of Zero — integers, number line, Brahmagupta's fortune/debt framework, addition/subtraction of integers

Completes all 10 Class 6 Maths chapters (Ganita Prakash textbook).
Full Class 6 curriculum: 12 Science + 10 Maths = 22 chapters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Resolve tsc build failure — safeJson return type for config access

safeJson(row.config, {} as Record<string, unknown>) returned Record<string, unknown>,
making config.url/password/etc. typed as unknown. Passing unknown to functions
expecting string caused TypeScript strict-mode errors.

Fix: use {} as any as the fallback for config objects that are destructured
or passed to helper functions — equivalent to the original JSON.parse return type.
safeJson<unknown> for settings values to avoid T=null inference.

The sanitize() function in widgets.ts uses r.config (not row.config) and only
does structured destructuring — that usage is correct and unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: address code review findings (bugs, warnings, quality)

Bugs fixed:
- Replace env!("HOME") with std::env::var("HOME") in build.rs and
  version_check.rs — compile-time baking broke cross-user installs
- Fix stderr deadlock in build thread: read stdout and stderr
  concurrently instead of sequentially; also writes stderr to build log
- Fix lexicographic .xbps version comparison in repo.rs — use
  version_newer_pub() so "10.0" correctly beats "9.0"

Warnings fixed:
- Fix += multiline append: strip opening quote, avoid spurious leading
  space when existing value is empty
- Fix $var substitution in template.rs: sort keys longest-first to
  prevent prefix matches corrupting longer variable names
- version_newer now handles prerelease suffixes: "0.45.0" > "0.45.0beta1"
- update_shlibs_file returns Result, caller shows error on write failure
- Clarify depends= skip logic with explicit parens (no behavior change)

Code quality:
- Delete dead code: Status::priority(), ShlibEntry::pkg_ver,
  BumpResult.new_checksum, all #[allow(dead_code)] attributes
- Replace 35-line hand-rolled date/time with chrono::Local::now().format()
- Move build output buffer trim outside per-message loop (O(n²) → O(1))
- Compute visible_packages() once per frame, pass visible_len to draw_header
- Extract discover_and_load() helper used by App::new and App::refresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(guides): add color inheritance for callout box child elements

Bare element selectors (p, ul, ol, li, strong) were overriding
inherited colors inside callout boxes (cta-box, info-box, tip-box,
etc.) on both public guide pages and the in-app reader panel.

  all callout box types in generator normalization

  selectors (e.g. "ul, ol { ... }")

- Add text-align: left for lists inside cta-box
- Regenerate all 114 guide HTML files

Task 29: Python server helper — Django middleware and WSGI wrapper (#31)

Add BuildBannerMiddleware for Django and buildbanner_wsgi wrapper
for generic WSGI apps. Both reuse core.py for git info and token
auth. Re-export from __init__.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Task 29: test: add Django middleware and WSGI wrapper tests

12 Django tests covering happy path, path interception, pass-through,
token auth (valid/invalid/missing/short-token). 13 WSGI tests covering
happy path, response headers, interception/pass-through, token auth.

- Remove dead `json` import and unused `logger` from django.py
- Remove unused `logger` from wsgi.py

commit.message:
fix(frontend): add 'use client' to InsightCard — fixes Error ID 768938011 (#10)

* fix(frontend): resolve production render errors on home and content pages

- Delete [locale]/loading.tsx: conflicted with manual <Suspense> in page.tsx causing Server Components render error (Error ID 768938011) in Next.js 16.1.5 Turbopack
- Remove `export const dynamic = 'force-static'` from 6 "use client" pages (features, about, pricing, faq, tools, contact): force-static on client components produces empty <main> in Next.js 16.1.5 Turbopack
- Build verified: npm run build passes with 0 errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(frontend): add 'use client' to InsightCard to fix Server Components render error

InsightCard uses onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} (added for Q5 comparison
feature) but lacked 'use client'. When LatestInsightsSection (async server
component) rendered InsightCard, React's server renderer threw because event
handlers are not allowed in server components, causing Error ID 768938011.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: Hong Kong stocks screening system

完整的香港股票筛选和数据自动化系统，四层架构设计。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Major paper upgrade: multi-model generality, stronger detection, content science

- Add comprehensive README with API docs, quick start, parameter guide
- Fix paper language: replace "undetectable" with measured claims throughout
- Add 5 new experiment scripts:
  1. v2_multimodel: test across SD-VAE-MSE, SD-VAE-EMA, SDXL-VAE + cross-model
  2. v2_robustness_deployment: 18 distortion types including screenshot sim, VAE re-encode
  3. v2_detection_strength: 7 detector architectures across 3 feature domains
  4. v2_content_science: image statistics predicting capacity + Jacobian analysis
  5. v2_serious_dataset: 200 CIFAR-10 images with bootstrap CIs
- Restructure paper with new sections for all 7 improvements
- Rename GitHub repo from patchseg to patchsteg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
